ham.subject: Transaction Alert: ₹5,000 Debit from Your Account
ham.body:
Dear Customer,

We have processed a debit of INR 5,000 from your savings account (Account No: 1234567890) on 15-04-2026. This transaction was made using the debit card ending in 4321.

If you recognize this transaction, no action is needed. If you suspect any fraudulent activity, please contact our 24/7 support immediately at 1800-123-456.

Thank you for banking with us.

Sincerely,

Customer Support Team
XYZ Bank

spam.subject: Urgent: Resolve Your FedEx Delivery Fee NOW
spam.body:
Hi there,

Our records show that your recent shipment with FedEx (Tracking # FD123456789) was not delivered. As per our policy, a delivery fee of $25 will be charged to your account if the package is not claimed within 7 days.

Please click the link below to confirm the fee and avoid any late charges:
<URL>

Act fast – this offer expires in 48 hours!

Regards,
FedEx Customer Service
